data.title: Xinjiang's 15th Five-Year Plan (2026-30) aims to align with national modernization goals, focusing on reform and development.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in Beijing, a report from Xinjiang Today highlighted the region's upcoming 15th Five-Year Plan spanning from 2026 to 2030. This plan aims to align national modernization efforts with local goals for reform, development, and security in Xinjiang. The guidance for this plan was released during the Fourth Plenary session, emphasizing the synchronization of regional aspirations with the broader drive for advancement.

data.title: aulumu showcases high-performance design at CES 2026. Highlighted G09, M10 models. Impressive reviews. #CES2026
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 13, 2026, aulumu, a design brand known for its high-performance gear, garnered notice at CES 2026 for displaying a variety of its top products. These items emphasized the brand's unique strategy of combining functionality with visual appeal. The showcased products included...

data.title: SEC chair Paul Atkins backs bipartisan bill for crypto market regulation to land on Trump’s desk this year.
data.description: The chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission, Paul Atkins, has expressed significant backing for bipartisan legislation that targets transitioning cryptocurrency markets away from a regulatory ambiguous area.

data.title: Husqvarna partners with British Masters on DP World Tour, signing multi-year deal, enhancing brand visibility in golf.
data.description: In Stockholm on January 13, 2026, it was announced that Husqvarna, a prominent company in robotic lawnmowing and a division of Husqvarna Group, has entered a multi-year deal to be the Title Partner of the British Masters, a prestigious golf tournament. This partnership marks a significant move in the sporting world as Husqvarna takes on this role in one of the oldest and most renowned golf events globally. The 2026 edition of the tournament will now be known as the Husqvarna British Masters, showcasing the company's commitment to the event.

data.title: TryHard Holdings Limited and Carnegie Hill Capital Partners team up to create a global entertainment investment fund.
data.description: Tryhard Holdings Limited has recently announced a significant collaboration with Carnegie Hill Capital Partners, entering into a binding agreement to establish a global entertainment investment fund. The partnership aims to leverage their combined expertise and resources to create new opportunities in the entertainment industry. The fund's initial capital is reported to be $100 million, signaling a strong commitment to investing in various entertainment ventures worldwide. This collaboration is expected to drive growth and innovation in the sector, with both companies excited about the prospects of this strategic partnership.

data.title: Delta receives double "A" rating from CDP for climate change and water security for the fifth time; less than 1% of 22,000+ participants achieve this.
data.description: Based in Taipei, on January 13, 2026, Delta, a prominent company specializing in power management and sustainable solutions, received the prestigious double "A List" ranking in both the 2025 "Climate Change" and "Water Security" reports by CDP. Remarkably, this marks the fifth consecutive time Delta has achieved this recognition. This year, Delta stands out amongst the 22,000+ companies that participated, with less than 1% achieving such a notable status in these crucial categories.

data.title: Crypto extortion crimes on the rise in France as armed robbers resort to kidnapping and home invasions to target investors.
data.description: There has been a significant increase in armed robberies aimed at crypto investors, where criminals resort to tactics such as kidnapping and home invasions to steal their digital assets.

data.title: Bitwise CIO criticizes limits on Bitcoin in 401(k)s as Warren urges SEC action, after Trump allows crypto in retirement plans.
data.description: In August, US President Donald Trump issued an executive order allowing for the inclusion of cryptocurrencies in 401(k) retirement plans, potentially impacting millions of Americans planning for retirement.

data.title: Judge halts Tennessee's action against Kalshi; allows event contracts as injunction hearing awaits.
data.description: A federal judge has granted permission for Kalshi to continue offering event contracts in Tennessee, after temporarily restraining state regulators. This decision comes pending a preliminary injunction hearing and allows Kalshi to operate in the state uninterrupted. The company can now maintain its operations and provide its services to customers in Tennessee.

data.title: Solana Policy Institute calls on SEC to exempt DeFi devs from exchange regulations, citing potential threat to innovation.
data.description: The Solana Policy Institute has recommended that the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) differentiate non-custodial decentralized finance (DeFi) code from exchanges. The institute expressed concern that the existing regulations could hinder innovation in this space. The initiative aims to clarify regulatory standards for these emerging technologies to support growth and development.

data.title: Thailand aims to crack down on illicit flows by monitoring gold and cryptocurrencies with a national data hub and stricter reporting measures.
data.description: Thailand is aiming to enhance its monitoring mechanisms to combat illicit activities within its financial system. The country is preparing to implement stricter reporting regulations and enforcement of the Travel Rule to track suspicious transactions involving both traditional and digital assets. Additionally, Thailand is in the process of establishing a national data hub to streamline the tracking of illicit flows. These measures are part of the government's efforts to tackle financial crimes more effectively.

data.title: Finastra's Trade Innovation boosts BNI global trade ops, accelerating customer onboarding. Jan 13, 2026, Jakarta.
data.description: Finastra, a renowned financial services software company, has unveiled a centralized single platform in Jakarta, Indonesia on January 13, 2026. This innovative platform aims to enhance efficiency, transparency, and scalability in global trade operations. PT. Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BNI), a leading player in the industry, is collaborating with Finastra on this project. This collaborative effort is expected to revolutionize the sector, offering increased speed and visibility in operations. The platform is set to optimize trade operations and drive growth for businesses, with a focus on streamlining processes and enhancing overall performance.

data.title: Infortrend debuts KS 3000U Edge AI server for mid-sized orgs, simplifying AI deployment at edge.
data.description: Taipei, 13th January 2026 - Infortrend Technology, Inc. (TWSE: 2495), a top player in enterprise storage and AI offerings, unveiled the KS 3000U edge AI server today. This new server is designed to empower mid-sized businesses and dispersed locations to implement AI inference efficiently.

data.title: For Ethereum to last 100 yrs, it needs quantum resistance, scalability, and a decentralized block-building model - Buterin.
data.description: For Ethereum to withstand the test of time, it requires quantum resistance, a scalable architecture, and an improved block-building model that can resist centralization pressures. These elements are crucial for the long-term success of Ethereum as they enhance the platform's security, efficiency, and decentralization. By implementing these advancements, Ethereum can strengthen its position in the market and adapt to future technological challenges. Innovations in these areas will be key in ensuring Ethereum's continued relevance and competitiveness in the ever-evolving cryptocurrency landscape.
